svg.title: Playwright assertions — three types reference chart
svg.desc: Three assertion types: conditional boolean methods, web-first auto-retry assertions, and non-retrying value assertions

g.text: if / else logic only | No auto-retry | No timeout
Instant DOM check — ek baar, koi wait nahi
expect(locator / page).to___() → Promise<void> | Fails test with error + screenshot on timeout
array form = multiple els order se
Login ke baad URL verify karo
No auto-retry | No timeout | Instant | void (no await)
expect(value).to___() → void (synchronous) | Use when value already extracted hai
